Thank you for contributing to agent-go! Please fill out the sections below.

## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Link to the issue this PR addresses. Use "Closes #123" or "Refs #123". -->

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] CI / tooling change

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested these changes. -->

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make vet` passes
- [ ] Added new tests for new functionality
- [ ] Manually verified the change

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] I have updated documentation where applicable
- [ ] I have added entries to CHANGELOG.md under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I have not introduced secrets, API keys, or credentials
- [ ] My changes do not decrease test coverage below 70% for core packages

## Breaking Changes

<!-- If this PR introduces breaking changes, describe them and the migration path. -->

None.
